message: So, the other day, I was getting ready to take my pup, Max, for a walk when I realized I had forgotten the most important thing—his leash! Picture me, standing there in my slippers, trying to wrangle a wiggly dog who clearly has better plans than a leisurely stroll. Between Max's enthusiasm and my scrambling to find a makeshift leash (a long scarf, anyone?), I couldn't help but laugh at the comedy of not being ready. It’s a reminder that even the simplest outings require a bit of prep! Have you ever found yourself caught off guard like that? What’s your funniest ‘not ready’ moment with your furry friends? 🤣  P.S. that little refresher on pet preparedness really helped me get my act together!
